// Mock data — mirrors the backend in-memory store

export const mockCategories = [
  { id: 1, name: "Electronics",     description: "Electronic devices and components" },
  { id: 2, name: "Office Supplies", description: "Stationery and office equipment" },
  { id: 3, name: "Furniture",       description: "Desks, chairs, and storage" },
  { id: 4, name: "Networking",      description: "Cables, switches, and routers" },
  { id: 5, name: "Peripherals",     description: "Keyboards, mice, monitors" },
];

export const mockItems = [
  { id: 1,  name: 'MacBook Pro 14"',     category_id: 1, stock_count: 12,  price: 1999.99, location: "Warehouse A", velocity_status: "fast"   },
  { id: 2,  name: 'Dell Monitor 27"',    category_id: 5, stock_count: 8,   price: 349.99,  location: "Warehouse B", velocity_status: "medium" },
  { id: 3,  name: "Logitech MX Keys",    category_id: 5, stock_count: 25,  price: 99.99,   location: "Shelf C-2",   velocity_status: "fast"   },
  { id: 4,  name: "Ergonomic Chair",     category_id: 3, stock_count: 5,   price: 499.99,  location: "Warehouse A", velocity_status: "slow"   },
  { id: 5,  name: "Standing Desk",       category_id: 3, stock_count: 3,   price: 799.99,  location: "Warehouse A", velocity_status: "slow"   },
  { id: 6,  name: "USB-C Hub 7-in-1",   category_id: 4, stock_count: 40,  price: 49.99,   location: "Shelf A-1",   velocity_status: "fast"   },
  { id: 7,  name: "Ethernet Cable 10m", category_id: 4, stock_count: 60,  price: 12.99,   location: "Shelf A-3",   velocity_status: "medium" },
  { id: 8,  name: "A4 Paper Ream",      category_id: 2, stock_count: 200, price: 8.99,    location: "Shelf B-1",   velocity_status: "fast"   },
  { id: 9,  name: "Whiteboard Markers", category_id: 2, stock_count: 7,   price: 5.99,    location: "Shelf B-2",   velocity_status: "medium" },
  { id: 10, name: "Cisco Switch 24-port",category_id: 4, stock_count: 4,  price: 899.99,  location: "Warehouse B", velocity_status: "slow"   },
  { id: 11, name: 'iPad Pro 12.9"',     category_id: 1, stock_count: 9,   price: 1099.99, location: "Warehouse A", velocity_status: "medium" },
  { id: 12, name: "Webcam 4K",          category_id: 5, stock_count: 15,  price: 149.99,  location: "Shelf C-1",   velocity_status: "fast"   },
  { id: 13, name: "Wireless Mouse",     category_id: 5, stock_count: 30,  price: 39.99,   location: "Shelf C-2",   velocity_status: "fast"   },
  { id: 14, name: "Filing Cabinet",     category_id: 3, stock_count: 6,   price: 249.99,  location: "Warehouse B", velocity_status: "slow"   },
  { id: 15, name: "Raspberry Pi 4",     category_id: 1, stock_count: 2,   price: 75.00,   location: "Shelf A-2",   velocity_status: "medium" },
  { id: 16, name: "HDMI Cable 2m",      category_id: 4, stock_count: 55,  price: 9.99,    location: "Shelf A-3",   velocity_status: "fast"   },
  { id: 17, name: "Stapler Heavy Duty", category_id: 2, stock_count: 18,  price: 24.99,   location: "Shelf B-2",   velocity_status: "slow"   },
  { id: 18, name: "Laptop Stand",       category_id: 5, stock_count: 22,  price: 59.99,   location: "Shelf C-1",   velocity_status: "medium" },
  { id: 19, name: "External SSD 1TB",   category_id: 1, stock_count: 11,  price: 129.99,  location: "Shelf A-2",   velocity_status: "fast"   },
  { id: 20, name: "Power Strip 6-outlet",category_id: 4, stock_count: 35, price: 29.99,   location: "Shelf B-3",   velocity_status: "medium" },
];

export const mockLocations = [
  { id: 1, name: "Warehouse A", type: "Warehouse", capacity: 500, used: 37 },
  { id: 2, name: "Warehouse B", type: "Warehouse", capacity: 300, used: 22 },
  { id: 3, name: "Shelf A-1",   type: "Shelf",     capacity: 50,  used: 40 },
  { id: 4, name: "Shelf A-2",   type: "Shelf",     capacity: 50,  used: 13 },
  { id: 5, name: "Shelf A-3",   type: "Shelf",     capacity: 50,  used: 115 },
  { id: 6, name: "Shelf B-1",   type: "Shelf",     capacity: 50,  used: 200 },
  { id: 7, name: "Shelf B-2",   type: "Shelf",     capacity: 50,  used: 25 },
  { id: 8, name: "Shelf B-3",   type: "Shelf",     capacity: 50,  used: 35 },
  { id: 9, name: "Shelf C-1",   type: "Shelf",     capacity: 50,  used: 37 },
  { id: 10, name: "Shelf C-2",  type: "Shelf",     capacity: 50,  used: 55 },
];
